content: Hono RPC hc<AppType>(): use 'import type { AppType } from ./server' (type-only import to avoid bundling server code). Create client: hc<AppType>('https://api.example.com/'). Global headers: hc<AppType>(base, { headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer TOKEN' } }). Per-request headers passed as second arg to method calls. Monorepo: set strict:true in both tsconfig; use TypeScript project references for cross-package access. CRITICAL: use SAME hono version on server and client (currently 4.12.27). web tsconfig must add reference to apps/server tsconfig to access AppType. AppType is exported from apps/server/src/main.ts as 'export type AppType = typeof app'. The chained router pattern (const apiRouter = new Hono().route()...) is required for type inference — statement-style app.route() is NOT chainable and breaks AppType.
